items.caption: A slide from a presentation with a white background and a blue and red header. the title at the top reads "catastrophic line leak detection is performed by:" in bold red letters. below the title, there is a list of bullet points in blue text, which detail the importance of field-generated leak testing. the points mention mechanical and electronic line leak detectors, the installation of the leak detector, the attachment of wires, the illumination of the light, and the question of whether the equipment will detect a catastrophic leak in the line. in the bottom right corner, there is a logo with the text "vaporless" and "manufacturing, inc." suggesting the name of the company associated with the presentation.
